seed_entries.title: Dana role v2 (supersedes)
seed_entries.body: Fact: Dana's role is Manager. This supersedes the earlier statement that Dana's role is Engineer.

seed_entries.title: Retention policy
seed_entries.body: Fact: In the EU region, retain data for 30 days. In the US region, retain data for 7 days.

seed_entries.title: Retention policy rationale
seed_entries.body: The EU retention period is longer due to customer contracts; the US retention period is shorter due to cost.

assertions.t3_query: What is the EU retention period?
